title: bridge-slack no dedup; Slack retry causes duplicate nie forward
description: bridge-slack/src/bridge.rs: no seen-IDs dedup. Slack retries Events API delivery on 5xx/timeout. Bridge always returns 200, but in practice the 200 comes before message is enqueued in the mpsc; a bridge crash during that window lets Slack retry. The 'ts' field is available for dedup but unused.
